title: taraxacum fragosum
intro: Taraxacum fragosum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum fragosum include its ability to act as a diuretic and to support the body's natural detoxification processes. The plant is also known for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum fragosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
